title: Ice Maker Countertop Machine, 9 Bullet Ice Cubes Ready in 6 Mins, 22lbs Ice Cubes in 24H, Self-Cleaning, LCD Display, 2.1L Electric Stainless Steel Ice Maker with Ice Scoop, Basket

stopped_working: Crapped out one week after warranty

I used this ice maker every day since I bought it. It worked great, relatively quite and easy to use. Then one day a year later it just quit on me. I can tell it’s getting power but not doing it’s job. Therefore, I have just ordered another ice maker, different brand.

This ice maker was great, but despite cleaning properly, etc, it is already broken. Bought in March of 2022 and it’s August… started having issues in July. I wouldn’t recommend this ice maker because it is too pricey to break in 5 months.
noise_vibration: Was noisy and broke after a few months of use

6 months and it stopped working. The pump makes a loud noise and stopped workin. Not pleased at all with it and don’t recommend it.
